name: Angelica Liqueur 1 (Yellow Chartreuse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped angelica root, lemon balm, hyssop, cinnamon stick, and mace in a large jar.
2. Add the vodka to the jar.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Close the jar tightly and allow the mixture to steep for one week.
5. After steeping, strain the liquid through cheesecloth several times to remove solids.
6. If desired, add the sugar syrup and a pinch of saffron threads to taste.
7. Bottle the liqueur and store in a cool, dark place until ready to use.
